title: Spontex Microfibre Cloths, Pack of 4 Scrub & Wipe Multipurpose Cleaning Pad
features: Brightly coloured and super absorbent multi-purpose microfibre cleaning cloths
Efficient with just water so no need to use chemicals
Long lasting as they can be machine washed up to 500 times
Remove dirt, grease and dust with ease
VERSATILE: With 2 different sides and an absorbent sponge centre this pad is perfect for a variety of tasks all around the house.
REMOVES 99% OF BACTERIA. Efficient with just water, the blue microfibre side removes dirt, grease and 99% of bacteria with ease.
ECOLOGICAL: The microfibre side is efficient with just water, so there is no need for chemicals!
NON-SCRATCH. The grey scrubbing side removes stubborn marks and stains without scratching.
description: Spontex Scrub and Wipe Cleaning Pad is a multipurpose pad which thanks to its two different sides and absorbent sponge centre is super efficient and effectively removes dirt and marks. This specially designed pad has a grey scrubbing side to remove stubborn marks and stains without scratching and a blue microfibre side to remove dirt and grease with ease.
